---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new reusable harness skill, validation rule, install path, or documentation improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What reusable agent harness problem should this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the change you want.

## Who Benefits

Which kinds of repositories or agent workflows would use this?

## Repo-Neutrality Check

- [ ] This is not specific to one private repository.
- [ ] This does not require private URLs, credentials, accounts, or environment assumptions.
- [ ] Examples can be written generically.

## Alternatives Considered

What simpler option or existing skill could solve this?

## Validation Ideas

How could maintainers test that this improves the project?
